channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Joe Highsmith goes from making the cut to a PGA Tour winner at the Cognizant Classic
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Two days after Joe Highsmith made a nervy par putt to make the cut, he won the Cognizant Classic with the lowest weekend ever at PGA National and is going to the Masters.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tre White leads Illinois to a 93-73 rout of No. 15 Michigan
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Tre White had 19 points and 11 rebounds to lead Illinois to a 93-73 rout of No. 15 Michigan 93-73 on Sunday. Kylan Boswell and Kasparas Jakucionis each scored 17 points for the Illini (19-11, 11-8 Big Ten), who have beaten Michigan (22-7, 14-4) nine straight times.
item.dc:creator: DAVE HOGG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jimmy Butler failed to pay $260,000 in rent, left nearly $130,000 in damages in Miami home, lawsuit says
item.description: A lawsuit says former Miami Heat star Jimmy Butler failed to pay nearly $260,000 in rent and left $127,000 in damages after moving out of his Florida home.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Stephen Curry says he's retiring from the slam dunk after throwing down 1st jam in 6 years
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Stephen Curry dunked! The Golden State Warriors star had the ball alone for a seemingly easy, uncontested layup against the 76ers, when — for the first time in six years — he instead threw down a one-handed jam. Curry dunked for the first time since Feb.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Atrocious performance spoils Senior Day as Michigan basketball’s struggles continue vs. Illinois
item.description: The No. 15 Michigan Wolverines extended their losing streak vs. the Illinois Fighting Illini to nine after falling 93-73 inside Crisler Arena.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Jaden Agassi, son of tennis legends Andre Agassi and Steffi Graf, works to make mark in baseball
item.description: It’s not the least bit surprising that Jaden Agassi — son of tennis legends Andre Agassi and Steffi Graf — had a racket in his hand from the time he could walk.
item.dc:creator: David Brandt, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Kansas' Zeke Mayo shows screenshots of racist, hateful messages he received after Texas Tech loss
item.description: LAWRENCE, Kan. (AP) — Kansas guard Zeke Mayo showed screenshots of racist, hateful messages he received following his performance in a loss to No. 10 Texas Tech. Mayo shared the screenshots Saturday. His account on X appeared to be deactivated Sunday morning.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: MLB's Rob Manfred considering Pete Rose's removal from ineligible list: report
item.description: MLB Commissioner Rob Manfred is reportedly considering removing Pete Rose from the ineligible list as President Donald Trump said he would pardon him.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Homophobic chant at San Diego FC's inaugural home match condemned by coach, sporting director
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — San Diego FC coach Mikey Varas and sporting director Tyler Heaps expressed disappointment and anger after their club's inaugural home match was marred in the second half by three occurrences of the homophobic chant frequently heard at the Mexican national team's soccer matches.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Donato scores twice, Blackhawks snap 5-game skid with 6-3 road win over Ducks
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Ryan Donato had two goals and an assist, and the Blackhawks ended a five-game losing streak with a 6-3 road victory over the Anaheim Ducks on Saturday night. Teuvo Teravainen had a goal and two assists and Lukas Reichel, Wyatt Kaiser and Patrick Marron also scored.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Miracle finish: Moreau Catholic pulls off unbelievable victory over Cardinal Newman for NCS D-II title
item.description: Jalen Arnold draws foul with 0.4 seconds left, makes two free throws to lift Moreau Catholic to stunning win.
item.dc:creator: Devin Bradshaw, correspondent, The Mercury News

item.title: BYU wins sixth straight, cruising past West Virginia
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fousseyni Traore recorded the 21st double-double of his career on Saturday evening as No. 25 BYU defeated West Virginia 77-56 in front of a sold-out Marriott Center. “It was an ultimate tale of two halves," head coach Kevin Young said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: New Jersey cools off Utah HC, 3-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The New Jersey Devils scored twice in the third period to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 3-1 at Delta Center on Saturday, ending Utah's three-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Runnin' Utes trounce Arizona State, 99-73
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Ezra Ausar scored 25 points and Utah put up 58 points in the second half to pull away from Arizona State to earn its first win under interim coach Josh Eilert, 99-73 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC's historic home opener draws record crowd
item.description: Fans were buzzing with excitement as San Diego FC kicked off their inaugural MLS home opener against St. Louis City SC on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: JuJu Watkins scores 30, No. 4 USC defeats No. 2 UCLA 80-67 to win 1st Big Ten regular-season title
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — JuJu Watkins scored 30 points and No. 4 Southern California defeated second-ranked UCLA 80-67 on Saturday night to clinch the program's first Big Ten regular-season title in its league debut. The crosstown rivals came into the sold-out game at Pauley Pavilion tied for first.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cooper Flagg returns for 2nd half after leaving No. 2 Duke’s victory with eye injury
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Duke players see star freshman Cooper Flagg’s toughness on a regular basis and that was on display for everyone else Saturday night. Flagg returned for the second half of the No.
item.dc:creator: BOB SUTTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Avalanche land Lindgren, Wild get Nyquist and Panthers acquire Seth Jones in busy day of NHL trades
item.description: Defensemen Seth Jones and Ryan Lindgren and forward Gustav Nyquist were on the move on Saturday as three Central Division teams got a jump on the NHL’s looming trade deadline.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 7 St. John's clinches first Big East regular-season title in 40 years and eyes more celebrations
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The final horn sounded and St. John’s skipped cutting down the nets. The players instead held the trophy after the No.
item.dc:creator: LARRY FLEISHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers agree to trade Deebo Samuel to Commanders: report
item.description: Deebo Samuel appears to have found a new home. The San Francisco 49ers and Washington Commanders have reached an agreement on a trade for the star receiver, according to ESPN.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gavin Lowe scores 35 as Olympus rolls to 5A title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The first two times Olympus and Highland met this season, both games were decided by a total of four points. But in Friday's 5A championship, it wasn't close at all.
item.dc:creator: ABC 4
